2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

UNDERGRADUATE APPROVED COURSES

Course Numbering System

The first digit of the course number determines the level of the course, and the last two digits identify the course. Courses ending with the numeral 8 or 9 are the only courses that are repeatable for credit. Course levels are designated as follows:

000-099: Non-credit courses 100-199: Courses primarily for first-year students 200-299: Courses primarily for sophomore students
